title: 日本ダービーの後に・ノイズ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide takes the Japanese Derby crown,
but instead of feeling joy, she comes away with a
sense of fear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her numerous calculations, Winning
Ticket and Narita Taishin both have something
that keeps defying her estimations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tries to figure out what that "something"
might be and concludes that she lacks what they
possess—an iron will to succeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon reaching this conclusion, she asks me to
increase her training intensity so she won't lose at
the Kikuka Sho.
